programs.programName: Nevada Program of All-Inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE)

verified.notes: Nevada PACE program launched in 2025 per SB207 (effective July 1, 2025). Age requirement (55+) confirmed from official state presentation. Income and asset limits not specified in available sources; PACE is capitated program serving dual-eligible Medicare/Medicaid beneficiaries, so federal Medicaid eligibility rules likely apply but state-specific thresholds not found. Official phone number for Nevada PACE applications not located in search results; contact information may be available through Nevada DHHS or state Medicaid office.
